technical_replicate: Hormone treatments were done in triplicate...
experimental_design: dimerization of AR ligand-binding domain (LBD) is induced by receptor agonists but not by antagonists
factor_value: no FRET signal was detected in the absence of added hormone, but it was strongly induced by AR agonists (testosterone, dihydrotesterone and R1881)
